name: otree-bots
description: Live browser-based bot testing for oTree experiments

scripts.build: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css src/renderer/focus.html src/renderer/bot-view.html dist/renderer/
scripts.dev: tsc && cp src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/styles.css src/renderer/focus.html src/renderer/bot-view.html dist/renderer/ && electron dist/main/index.js --verbose
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.dev:capture: npm run build && rm -rf dev-screenshots && npx electron scripts/dev-capture.js -- --players 3
